sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64407" key="magganeutiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαγγᾰν-ευτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n64407.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fit for trickery</tr_>, etc.; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ -κή</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>), <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">magical art</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:209" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.209</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
